text_raw: It'll be a shame if the blood stains...
text_clean: It'll be a shame if the blood stains...

text_raw: Ah, you're the rat that's been sniffing about!
text_clean: Ah, you're the rat that's been sniffing about!

text_raw: fuck his title, fuck his estate...
text_clean: fuck his title, fuck his estate...

text_raw: You really know how to get under my skin.
text_clean: You really know how to get under my skin.

text_raw: Just when fortune starts to favor me, you go and spoil it!
text_clean: Just when fortune starts to favor me, you go and spoil it!

text_raw: I will not be scorned by the likes of you.
text_clean: I will not be scorned by the likes of you.

text_raw: Do you fancy yourself like the nobles?
text_clean: Do you fancy yourself like the nobles?

text_raw: They always mocked my low-born, tainted blood.
text_clean: They always mocked my low-born, tainted blood.

text_raw: But what of my noble half?!
text_clean: But what of my noble half?!

text_raw: Those preening peacocks flaunting their wealth...
text_clean: Those preening peacocks flaunting their wealth...

text_raw: Soon they'll be grovelling at my feet.
text_clean: Soon they'll be grovelling at my feet.

text_raw: Whether lost in Dreamer's Bliss, or broken by my hand.
text_clean: Whether lost in Dreamer's Bliss, or broken by my hand.

text_raw: I have no place for failures.
text_clean: I have no place for failures.

text_raw: You think you can scamper off after all you've done? Get back here!
text_clean: You think you can scamper off after all you've done? Get back here!
